description: A plain documentary evidence photograph (no design overlay or on-image text) of seized contraband. Ten or more bulky burlap/woven-sack bales, dirty off-white and gray, are stacked into a roughly pyramidal pile on a blue plastic pallet/scale on the floor of an office or evidence room. The bales are bound with rope/cord; the top-left bale is torn open, revealing dark plastic wrapping and a tangle of multicolored material inside. In the background are file cabinets, cardboard boxes, a wall-mounted red fire extinguisher, a door and office equipment. This corresponds to the tweet's account of a 524-kilo cocaine seizure from a vessel from Venezuela near Cabo Rojo, Puerto Rico. It is a routine seizure-documentation photo rather than a designed meme/graphic.
